description: Add a new device to ManageEngine OpManager for monitoring. The application is already open and logged in on the dashboard (credentials: admin/Admin@123 if re-login is needed). Navigate to the device inventory and add a new device with IP address 10.0.2.15 (the VM's network interface). Set the display name to 'Linux-Server-01' and device type to 'Server'. The SNMP community string 'public' is configured on the target device.
